scores.correctness_notes: Core integrate() call is correct and wait/all_active pattern matches gold standard. However, missing juju.remove_relation() and via parameter details. The juju.exec() method may not exist (gold standard only mentions juju.cli()). The all_blocked() usage is reasonable but not in gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.exec() is not mentioned in the gold standard and likely hallucinated. jubilant.all_blocked() may or may not exist. The detailed show-unit JSON structure with 'relation-info'/'related-units'/'data' keys appears to be fabricated detail not verified against the API.
